nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 4am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 4am and 5am, then patchy fog and a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy. Low around 42, with temperatures rising to around 44 overnight. Northeast wind around 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and a chance of showers and thunderstorms before 3pm. Cloudy, with a high near 52. East wind 9 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 8pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely between 8pm and 2am, then a slight chance of rain. Cloudy. Low around 37, with temperatures rising to around 40 overnight. East wind 6 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Partly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain before 7am. Partly sunny, with a high near 62. West wind around 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 41. Southeast wind around 6 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 72. South wind 5 to 9 mph.
